Boli · AI Lesson Planner for Maldivian Teachers · prototype

About Boli

Boli is an AI-powered planning assistant built for Maldivian teachers. Every lesson plan, scheme of work, checklist, assessment and report comment is aligned to the Maldives National Curriculum.

Pick a tool, choose your grade, subject and outcomes, and Boli drafts ready-to-use material in your school's own format — so you spend less time formatting and more time teaching.

Seenu Atoll School · S. Meedhoo, Addu
